title: RMM: Post-Compromise Remote Access Activity
description: Detects remote monitoring and management tooling used after compromise, including ScreenConnect, AnyDesk, and Atera process execution plus outbound relay traffic.
query: (('Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs') and ('Process Name' like '*ScreenConnect*' or 'Process Name' like '*AnyDesk*' or 'Process Name' like '*AteraAgent*' or 'Command Line' like '*screenconnect*' or 'Command Line' like '*anydesk*' or 'Command Line' like '*atera*')) or (('Log Source' = 'SOC Sysmon Network Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs') and ('Destination Hostname' like '*screenconnect*' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*atera*' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*rmm*')) | stats count as Events, unique('Destination Hostname') as Destinations, unique('Command Line') as Commands by 'Host Name (Server)', 'Process Name', 'Trace ID' | sort -Events

ask_ai_prompts: Which RMM tools were launched and which relay hosts were contacted?
Differentiate expected IT management from post-compromise remote access.

references.name: CISA: Remote Monitoring and Management software security guidance
